params.name: Campbell's Soup Cans
params.description:
On Feb 26, 1962 AD, Warhol completed the creation of the thirty-two Campbell's Soup Cans paintings.
This theme painting is a work of Pop Art representative Warhol. Although its shape appears to be the same, careful observation reveals unique defects on each of the thirty-two cans of Campbell's soup. This work pioneered the use of daily life items as creative material, and also propelled Pop Art into the mainstream, becoming one of the mainstream arts.
